ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_churned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has churned (left the service) */,
  "days_since_active" INTEGER /* Number of days since the user last engaged with the service */,
  "repeats_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of repeated actions by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address for communication */,
  "signup_date" TEXT /* Date when the user signed up */,
  "last_active_date" TEXT /* Date of the last user activity */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Current subscription plan of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* User's age */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user whose metrics are being tracked */,
  "average_events_weekend" REAL /* Average number of events user engages in during weekends */,
  "average_events_weekday" REAL /* Average number of events user engages in during weekdays */,
  "num_songs_played_7d" INTEGER /* Total songs played by the user in the last 7 days */,
  "num_songs_played_30d" INTEGER /* Total songs played by the user in the last 30 days */,
  "num_songs_played_90d" INTEGER /* Total songs played by the user in the last 90 days */,
  "total_events_7d" INTEGER /* Total number of events in the last 7 days */,
  "total_events_30d" INTEGER /* Total number of events in the last 30 days */,
  "total_events_90d" INTEGER /* Total number of events in the last 90 days */,
  "average_session_duration_weekend" REAL /* Average session duration during weekends */,
  "average_session_duration_weekday" REAL /* Average session duration during weekdays */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_metrics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_data" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with the session */,
  "num_sessions" INTEGER /* Number of sessions conducted by the user */,
  "avg_time_per_session" REAL /* Average time spent by the user in each session */,
  "avg_events_per_session" REAL /* Average number of events per session by the user */,
  "max_session_duration" REAL /* Maximum session duration by the user */,
  "min_session_duration" REAL /* Minimum session duration by the user */,
  "total_session_duration" REAL /* Total session duration by the user */,
  "longest_inactive_period" REAL /* Longest period of inactivity between sessions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_interactions" (
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ad interaction record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user interacting with the ad */,
  "num_ads_7d" INTEGER /* Number of ads interacted with by the user in the last 7 days */,
  "percentage_ad" REAL /* Percentage of time the user interacted with ads during sessions */,
  "num_ads_clicked_7d" INTEGER /* Number of ads clicked by the user in the last 7 days */,
  "num_ads_skipped_7d" INTEGER /* Number of ads skipped by the user in the last 7 days */,
  "ad_engagement_score" REAL /* A score representing the user's overall engagement with ads */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thumbs_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing feedback */,
  "num_thumbs_up" INTEGER /* Number of thumbs up by the user */,
  "num_thumbs_down" INTEGER /* Number of thumbs down by the user */,
  "num_thumbs_up_7d" INTEGER /* Number of thumbs up given by the user in the last 7 days */,
  "num_thumbs_down_7d" INTEGER /* Number of thumbs down given by the user in the last 7 days */,
  "thumbs_feedback_score" REAL /* A score representing the user's overall feedback (positive or negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thumbs_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist action record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the action */,
  "num_add_to_playlist" INTEGER /* Number of times the user added songs to a playlist */,
  "num_remove_from_playlist" INTEGER /* Number of times the user removed songs from a playlist */,
  "num_playlists_created" INTEGER /* Number of playlists created by the user */,
  "num_playlists_shared" INTEGER /* Number of playlists shared by the user */,
  "total_songs_in_playlists" INTEGER /* Total number of songs in the user's playlists */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_actions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscription_history" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user whose subscription is tracked */,
  "num_upgrades" INTEGER /* Number of times the user upgraded their subscription */,
  "num_downgrades" INTEGER /* Number of times the user downgraded their subscription */,
  "current_plan" TEXT /* Current subscription plan of the user */,
  "last_plan_change_date" TEXT /* Date of the last subscription plan change */,
  "total_plan_changes" INTEGER /* Total number of subscription plan changes made by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscription_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user encountering the error */,
  "num_error_7d" INTEGER /* Number of errors logged by the user in the last 7 days */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of error encountered (if specified) */,
  "error_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the error encountered */,
  "error_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the error (e.g., minor, major, critical) */,
  "error_resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the error was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement summary record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with this engagement summary */,
  "num_events" INTEGER /* Total number of events conducted by the user */,
  "num_songs" INTEGER /* Total number of songs interacted with by the user */,
  "total_time_spent" REAL /* Total time spent by the user on the platform */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* A score representing the user's overall engagement level */,
  "engagement_trend" TEXT /* Trend of user engagement (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_friends" (
  "friend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each friend record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who added the friend */,
  "num_add_friend" INTEGER /* Total number of friends added by the user */,
  "total_friends_interacted" INTEGER /* Total number of friends the user has interacted with */,
  "last_friend_added_date" TEXT /* Date of the last friend added */,
  "total_messages_sent" INTEGER /* Total number of messages sent to friends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("friend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_friends_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_experience" (
  "experience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ad experience record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user experiencing the ads */,
  "num_ads" INTEGER /* Total number of ads shown to the user */,
  "num_ads_clicked" INTEGER /* Total number of ads clicked by the user */,
  "num_ads_skipped" INTEGER /* Total number of ads skipped by the user */,
  "ad_experience_score" REAL /* A score representing the user's overall ad experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experience_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_experience_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with the profile */,
  "profile_data" TEXT /* JSON object containing detailed profile information */,
  "registration_source" TEXT /* Source of user registration (e.g., app, web, referral) */,
  "last_profile_update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last profile update */,
  "profile_completeness" REAL /* Percentage of profile completeness */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* JSON object containing performance metrics data */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_period" TEXT /* Period covered by the report (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  "engagement_trend_score" REAL /* A score representing the trend of user engagement over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
